schema.name: tennis-coach-analysis
schema.purpose: Deterministic tennis-video evidence for LLM coaching analysis. Use only capabilities listed as supported.

conventions.time: Seconds from the start of the source video.
conventions.normalized_image_coordinates: [0, 0] is image top-left and [1, 1] is image bottom-right.
conventions.normalized_court_coordinates: [0, 0] is the far-left court corner and [1, 1] is the near-right court corner; values outside 0..1 are outside the detected court.
conventions.confidence: Values range from 0 to 1; higher means more reliable.
conventions.null: The metric could not be calculated from available evidence.
conventions.candidate: A heuristic observation that is not a validated semantic event.

source.duration: Elapsed time from source.start to source.end, including gaps.

data_quality.audio: Availability and total count of audio hit candidates.
data_quality.ball: Aggregate ball visibility, trajectory continuity, and confidence.
data_quality.shots: Counts of classified and abstained contact candidates.
data_quality.outcomes: Counts of resolved and unresolved candidate-rally outcomes.
data_quality.warnings: Mandatory limitations the LLM must account for.

analysis_capabilities.supported: Claims supported by available deterministic evidence.
analysis_capabilities.unsupported: Claims the LLM must not infer from this file.

target_player.player_id: Anonymous player ID matched to the supplied key frame.
target_player.margin: Confidence lead over the next-best anonymous player.
target_player.reason: Why matching abstained; null when resolved.

players.segments_detected: Candidate rallies in which the anonymous player was detected.
players.side_sample_counts: Samples assigned to the near and far court sides.
players.mean_identity_confidence_after_initializ: Identity confidence excluding the initial neutral assignment.
players.total_image_movement_distance_normalized: Summed image-space movement divided by image diagonal.
players.total_court_movement_normalized: Summed movement in normalized top-down court coordinates.
players.mean_court_position: Mean projected court [x, y], including outside points.
players.mean_in_court_position: Mean projected [x, y] using only inside-court points.
players.shot_counts: Confidence-gated forehand, backhand, and unknown counts.
players.shot_role_counts: Counts of serve, return, rally_shot, and unknown roles.
players.shot_outcome_counts: Counts of continued, error, and unresolved outcomes.
players.shot_continuation_rate: continued divided by continued plus error; unresolved endings are excluded.
players.is_target: True when this anonymous ID matches the supplied key frame.

segments.motion: OpenCV foreground-motion summaries; values are image-area ratios.
segments.players: Per-rally summaries for stable anonymous player IDs.

audio.hit_times: Absolute audio onset times, not validated racket contacts.
audio.hit_count: Number of audio onset candidates in this rally.
audio.mean_hit_energy: Mean onset-strength value; relative, not a physical unit.

ball.visible_ratio: Visible detections divided by ball observations.
ball.mean_normalized_image_speed_per_second: Mean image-space displacement per second; not physical ball speed.
ball.court_half_crossings: Candidate crossings of normalized court y=0.5.

shots.time: Audio candidate time used for contact association.
shots.player_id: Anonymous hitter identity, or null when unresolved.
shots.confidence: Combined ball, player detection/identity, pose, and geometric confidence.
shots.contact_confidence: Ball/player/proximity confidence independent of stroke class.
shots.contact_method: Signals used to infer contact; not direct racket detection.
shots.contact_point: Ball position at the associated audio-contact time in image coordinates.
shots.racket_hand_position: Pose-estimated dominant wrist used as a racket-location proxy.
shots.reason: Why classification abstained; null when classified.

warnings: Ball visibility is below 10%; contact and shot analysis may be sparse.
Mean ball detection confidence is below 0.2; treat trajectory evidence as preliminary.
Audio-derived boundaries and hit times are candidates, not validated rally or contact labels.
Court projection assumes points lie on the court plane; airborne ball projections are approximate.
Shot classification abstained for 58 of 66 contact candidates.

supported: candidate rally timing and audio hit analysis
approximate player positioning and court coverage
candidate court crossings and direction changes
unsupported: target-player identification from a key frame
